metadata.author: claude
metadata.description: Phase 35: CRDT merge for CO_ACTIVATED_WITH edges + space lineage

test_cases.name: Export includes lineage metadata
test_cases.description: Verify that exported SpaceMetadata contains lineage information

test_cases.name: CONFLICT_CRDT mode is available
test_cases.description: Verify that CONFLICT_CRDT (3) is a valid conflict mode for import
test_cases.notes: CONFLICT_CRDT mode sums evidence_count and takes max weight for CO_ACTIVATED_WITH edges

test_cases.name: EdgeData includes dimensional weights
test_cases.description: Verify that exported edges include dim_temporal, dim_semantic, dim_causal fields

test_cases.name: ImportResponse includes edges_merged count
test_cases.description: Verify that ImportResponse.stats includes edges_merged field for CRDT merge tracking
